learning_goals: Locate unit fractions (1/b) on number lines with correct spacing. Partition number lines into equal intervals and locate a/b using tick marks and labels.
core_concepts: Placement of unit fractions on a number line

misconceptions.description: Spacing units unevenly or inconsistently when partitioning the number line

misconceptions.misconception: Counting Tick Marks Instead of Spaces
misconceptions.description: Thinking each tick is a part, rather than the spaces between ticks

language_constraints: Use primarily numeric notation (1/4, 2/3, 5/8) with occasional word form (one-fourth, two-thirds) to reinforce both representations. Emphasize procedural language around 'equal spaces,' 'tick marks,' 'intervals,' and 'labeling.' Use precise mathematical language for the two-step method: partition/divide into equal intervals, then count and label positions.
